accounts.name: market
docs: The Market account to write revealed pool totals and transition to Finalized.

accounts.name: market_pool
docs: MarketPool PDA -- fixed-layout account for encrypted pool state.
Created alongside Market so init_pool can write to it via callback.

accounts.name: comp_def_account
docs: Can't check it here as it's not initialized yet.

docs: The MarketPool PDA that will receive the encrypted pool state in the callback.
Must already be initialized by create_market.

accounts.name: market_pool
docs: The MarketPool PDA to write encrypted zero state into.

accounts.name: comp_def_account
docs: Can't check it here as it's not initialized yet.

accounts.name: comp_def_account
docs: Can't check it here as it's not initialized yet.

accounts.name: market
docs: The Market account -- validates state, deadline, lock, stores pending bet data.

docs: The MarketPool PDA containing encrypted pool state.

accounts.name: user_position

Created via init_if_needed because Arcium callbacks cannot create accounts.

accounts.name: user_token_account

docs: Market vault token account (destination for bet transfer).

accounts.name: pending_bettor_token_account
docs: when timeout recovery triggers. When no timeout, this account is unused.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint for token account constraints.

accounts.name: market
docs: The Market account -- used for mpc_lock check/set.

accounts.name: market_pool
docs: The MarketPool PDA containing encrypted pool state.
Must have been initialized by init_pool callback before update_pool is called.

accounts.name: user_position
docs: UserPosition PDA (needed for callback account matching).

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Market vault token account (needed for callback account matching).

accounts.name: bettor_token_account
docs: Bettor's token account (needed for callback account matching).

accounts.name: market_pool
docs: The MarketPool PDA to write updated encrypted pool state into.

accounts.name: market
docs: The Market account to update sentiment, mpc_lock, pending fields, and total_bets.

accounts.name: user_position
docs: The UserPosition PDA to accumulate bet amounts on success.
Pre-created in place_bet with init_if_needed.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: The market vault holding USDC -- source for failure refund.

accounts.name: bettor_token_account
docs: The bettor's token account -- destination for failure refund.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program for transfer CPI on failure refund.

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Invalid USDC mint address

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not the admin

errors.name: MarketNotOpen
errors.msg: Market is not in Open state

errors.name: InvalidCategory
errors.msg: Invalid category value (must be 0-4)

errors.name: QuestionTooLong
errors.msg: Question exceeds maximum length of 200 characters

errors.name: ProtocolPaused
errors.msg: Protocol is paused

errors.name: CreatorNotWhitelisted
errors.msg: Creator is not whitelisted

errors.name: DeadlineTooSoon
errors.msg: Market deadline must be at least 1 hour in the future

errors.name: EmptyResolutionSource
errors.msg: Resolution source cannot be empty

errors.name: EmptyQuestion
errors.msg: Question cannot be empty

errors.name: MarketHasBets
errors.msg: Market has bets and cannot be cancelled

errors.name: ClusterNotSet
errors.msg: Arcium cluster not set on MXE account

errors.name: MpcLocked
errors.msg: Market MPC computation is in progress

errors.name: BetTooSmall
errors.msg: Bet amount must be at least 1 USDC (1,000,000 token units)

errors.name: MarketExpired
errors.msg: Market deadline has passed

errors.name: WrongSide
errors.msg: Cannot bet on opposite side of existing position

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient token balance

errors.name: MarketNotResolved
errors.msg: Market is not in Resolved state

errors.name: MarketNotFinalized
errors.msg: Market is not in Finalized state

errors.name: NoWinningPosition
errors.msg: No winning position to claim

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Payout has already been claimed

errors.name: NotMarketCreator
errors.msg: Caller is not the market creator

errors.name: MarketNotExpired
errors.msg: Market deadline has not passed yet

errors.name: InvalidOutcome
errors.msg: Invalid winning outcome (must be 1=Yes or 2=No)

types.name: ClockAccount
docs: An account storing the current network epoch

types.name: ComputationDefinitionAccount
docs: An account representing a [ComputationDefinition] in a MXE.

types.name: ComputationDefinitionMeta
docs: A computation definition for execution in a MXE.

types.name: ComputationSignature
docs: The signature of a computation defined in a [ComputationDefinition].

types.name: ComputePayoutsOutput
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.

fields.name: admin
docs: The admin authority that can update protocol settings

fields.name: fee_recipient
docs: The address that receives protocol fees

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: The USDC mint address used for all bets

fields.name: protocol_fee_bps
docs: Protocol fee in basis points (e.g., 200 = 2%)

fields.name: market_counter
docs: Auto-incrementing counter for market IDs

fields.name: paused
docs: Emergency pause flag for the protocol

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: creator
docs: The whitelisted creator's public key

fields.name: active
docs: Always true while PDA exists (closed on removal)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

types.name: Epoch
docs: The network epoch

types.name: HelloWorldOutput
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.

types.name: InitPoolOutput
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.

types.name: MXEAccount
docs: A MPC Execution Environment.

fields.name: id
docs: Unique market identifier (auto-incremented from Config.market_counter)

fields.name: question
docs: Market question, max 200 characters (tweet-length)

fields.name: resolution_source
docs: Resolution source URL or reference -- required, immutable after creation

fields.name: category
docs: Category: 0=Politics, 1=Crypto, 2=Sports, 3=Culture, 4=Economics

fields.name: resolution_time
docs: Unix timestamp when the market should be resolved

fields.name: state
docs: Market state: 0=Open, 1=Locked, 2=Resolved, 3=Disputed, 4=Finalized

fields.name: winning_outcome
docs: Winning outcome: 0=None, 1=Yes, 2=No

fields.name: sentiment
docs: Sentiment bucket: 0=Unknown, 1=LeaningYes, 2=Even, 3=LeaningNo

fields.name: total_bets
docs: Total number of bets placed on this market

fields.name: creator
docs: The address that created this market

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the market was created

fields.name: config_fee_recipient
docs: Snapshot of config fee_recipient at market creation

fields.name: config_fee_bps
docs: Snapshot of config protocol_fee_bps at market creation

fields.name: mpc_lock
docs: Sequential MPC lock - prevents concurrent bet processing

fields.name: lock_timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp when mpc_lock was set (for 60s timeout detection)

fields.name: pending_bettor
docs: Pubkey of the user whose bet is currently being processed by MPC

fields.name: pending_amount
docs: USDC amount of the pending bet (for refund on failure/timeout)

fields.name: pending_is_yes
docs: Which side the pending bet is on (for callback to update correct side of UserPosition)

fields.name: revealed_yes_pool
docs: Revealed yes pool total (set by compute_payouts_callback at Finalized state)

fields.name: revealed_no_pool
docs: Revealed no pool total (set by compute_payouts_callback at Finalized state)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed for the market account

fields.name: vault_bump
docs: PDA bump seed for the market vault token account
Vault seeds: [b"vault", market_id.to_le_bytes()]
Vault authority: this Market PDA (token::authority = market)

fields.name: market_pool_bump
docs: PDA bump seed for the associated MarketPool account
MarketPool seeds: [b"market_pool", market_id.to_le_bytes()]

types.name: MarketPool
docs: Fixed-layout account for encrypted pool state, used as MPC read/write target.
This account exists separately from Market because Market has variable-length
String fields (question, resolution_source) that make byte offsets non-deterministic.
MarketPool has ONLY fixed-size fields, so ArgBuilder.account() can always read
ciphertext at a known byte offset:
- yes_pool_encrypted offset: 8 (discriminator) + 8 (market_id) = 16 bytes
- no_pool_encrypted offset: 16 + 32 = 48 bytes
PDA seeds: [b"market_pool", market_id.to_le_bytes()]

fields.name: market_id
docs: Market ID this pool belongs to

fields.name: yes_pool_encrypted
docs: Encrypted Yes pool ciphertext (Arcium MXE-owned)

fields.name: no_pool_encrypted
docs: Encrypted No pool ciphertext (Arcium MXE-owned)

fields.name: nonce
docs: Arcium nonce for MXE ciphertext (required for decryption in subsequent MPC calls)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

types.name: MxeStatus
docs: The status of an MXE.

types.name: NodeMetadata
docs: location as [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html) country code

types.name: NodeRef
docs: A reference to a node in the cluster.
The offset is to derive the Node Account.
The current_total_rewards is the total rewards the node has received so far in the current
epoch.

types.name: Output
docs: An output of a computation.
We currently don't support encrypted outputs yet since encrypted values are passed via
data objects.

types.name: Parameter
docs: A parameter of a computation.
We differentiate between plaintext and encrypted parameters and data objects.
Plaintext parameters are directly provided as their value.
Encrypted parameters are provided as an offchain reference to the data.
Data objects are provided as a reference to the data object account.

types.name: SetUnset
docs: Utility struct to store a value that needs to be set by a certain number of participants (keys
in our case). Once all participants have set the value, the value is considered set and we only
store it once.

types.name: UpdatePoolOutput
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.

types.name: UserPosition
docs: Per-user, per-market position tracking
PDA seeds: [b"position", market_id.to_le_bytes(), user.key()]

fields.name: market_id
docs: The market this position belongs to

fields.name: user
docs: The user who owns this position

fields.name: yes_amount
docs: Amount bet on Yes outcome (in USDC lamports)

fields.name: no_amount
docs: Amount bet on No outcome (in USDC lamports)

fields.name: claimed
docs: Whether the user has claimed their payout

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed
